name: HWR_ESS_JOB_RUN
description: This is the table to store the running ESS job info

columns.Name: JOB_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for this table. The number should be generated from the sequence.

columns.Name: JOB_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the running ess job.

columns.Name: JOB_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the type of the scheduled job.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: This is the key-value parameters of the job.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This is running status of the job.

columns.Name: RESULT
columns.Comments: This is the result of the job execution.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the date that this job starts to run.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the end date of the running job execution

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: JOB_ATTR_5
columns.Comments: JOB_ATTR_5. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
